title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts and rumors
content: NFL free agency opened Monday with the legal negotiating window. We're following all the moves as they happen.

title: Judge, Anthony power Team USA over Mexico
content: Aaron Judge hit a two-run homer, and Roman Anthony added a three-run blast in a big third inning to lead the U.S. over Mexico in the WBC.

title: Source: Steelers add RB Dowdle on 2-year deal
content: The Steelers are signing former Panthers standout running back Rico Dowdle to a two-year, $12.25 million deal, NFL Network reported Monday.

title: Big-spending Raiders add Linderbaum, Walker
content: Free agent center Tyler Linderbaum reached agreement Monday on a record deal with the Raiders, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: SGA ties Wilt, drains clutch 3s in MVP showdown
content: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander tied a more than 60-year-old record by Wilt Chamberlain before drilling a pair of clutch 3-pointers to hand the Nuggets a 129-126 loss.

title: Golfer Woodland opens up about PTSD diagnosis
content: Gary Woodland said Monday he has been battling post-traumatic stress disorder in the wake of his 2023 brain surgery, telling Golf Channel in an emotional interview that he "can't waste energy" trying to hide it anymore.

title: Source: LB Lloyd gets $45M deal with Panthers
content: Former Jaguars linebacker Devin Lloyd agreed to a three-year, $45 million deal with the Panthers, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

title: Dort apologizes to Jokic after another flagrant
content: Thunder wing Luguentz Dort said he apologized to Nuggets center Nikola Jokic after committing a second fourth-quarter flagrant foul on him in the past two weeks.

title: Sources: Tua to sign 1-year deal with Falcons
content: Former Miami Dolphins quarterback Tua Tagovailoa plans to sign a one-year deal with the Atlanta Falcons, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: 📋 Yates' latest mini NFL mock draft
content: How has NFL free agency affected 2026 draft plans? Here are Field Yates' updated predictions for picks Nos. 1-10 after the first wave of deals.

title: Why the Dolphins released Tua Tagovailoa, and how he fits with the Falcons
content: If Michael Penix Jr. isn't ready for the season, the Falcons have a new lefty QB to start. Here are the key questions about the move.

title: Fans' guide to men's basketball this March: The 10 most important things to know
content: The five teams at the top. The players to watch. The narratives likely to shape the conference and NCAA tournaments.

title: Champ Week takeaways: Top seeds and NCAA hosts set, but should UConn or UCLA be No. 1 overall?
content: A week before Selection Sunday, which teams should be worried (Tennessee) or encouraged (Notre Dame)? And what's the state of the bubble?

title: Women's Bracketology: Championship Sunday brings clarity to No. 1 seeds, top 16
content: Texas locked up the No. 3 overall seed, Duke moved to a No. 2 and West Virginia should host tournament games.

title: NBA stars reflect on Wilt Chamberlain's 'mythical' legacy
content: As Gilgeous-Alexander closes in on breaking the longest 20-point scoring streak, NBA stars reflect on Chamberlin's legacy.

title: NHL Awards Watch: Celebrini challenges for MVP; dead heat for Norris
content: With about a month left in the season, here's how PHWA voters are feeling about all the major awards.

title: Mike Evans' fit in San Fran? 49ers bring leadership to WR room amid renovation
content: Evans has agreed to sign a three-year contract with the 49ers, leaving the Tampa Bay Buccaneers after 12 seasons.

title: Commanders land Oweh on 4-year, $100M deal
content: Former Chargers defensive end Odafe Oweh, who has 17.5 sacks since 2024, has agreed with the Commanders on a four-year, $100 million deal, his agents told ESPN.

title: Sources: QB Willis, Fins reach 3-year, $67.5M deal
content: Free agent QB Malik Willis, after reviving his career with the Packers, has agreed to a three-year, $67.5 million deal with the Dolphins, sources told ESPN.

title: Source: Saints spend $113M on Etienne, Edwards
content: The Saints have reached a four-year, $52M deal with ex-Jaguars RB Travis Etienne Jr. and a four-year, $61M deal with guard David Edwards, sources told ESPN.

title: Colts re-sign WR Pierce, trade Pittman to Steelers
content: The Indianapolis Colts are re-signing wide receiver Alec Pierce but are trading his running mate Michael Pittman Jr. out of town.

title: Source: Kelce returning to Chiefs on 1-year deal
content: Tight end Travis Kelce, a three-time champion with the Chiefs, has agreed to a one-year deal that is worth $12M and can max out at $15M, a source told ESPN.

title: Sources: Packers trading DL Gary to Cowboys
content: The Green Bay Packers are finalizing a deal that would send defensive lineman Rashan Gary to the Dallas Cowboys in exchange for a 2027 draft pick, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter. The pick is a fourth-rounder, according to NFL Network.

title: Did NIL kill the upset? Why power conferences just keep dominating in March
content: Where did all the Cinderella stories who busted our brackets go? Inside why the madness seems to be vanishing.

title: When will Cole return? Is Dominguez a trade candidate? What to expect from six make-or-break Yankees
content: Reinforcements? Trade bait? Some key players won't be on the field in the Bronx on Opening Day. Here's what that means.

title: How Jurickson Profar helped sign his replacement -- and next steps for the Braves
content: In the wake of Profar's suspension, Yastrzemski's signing has become even more important for Atlanta.

title: Despite wingback depth, Sergiño Dest injury threatens USMNT's World Cup hopes
content: Sergiño Dest insists his season isn't over after suffering a hamstring injury, but if it is, that's a headache the U.S. doesn't need for the World Cup.

title: Predicting the USWNT's World Cup starting lineup
content: With 2027 closer than you think, we forecast the 11 players Emma Hayes will count on for the tournament.

title: Milan's big derby win; Arsenal's FA Cup scare; Yamal stars again for Barcelona; more
content: Milan's derby win over Inter has opened a little bit of a title race again in Italy ... at least for now. Plus: Arsenal messed around in the FA Cup and nearly paid for it, while Lamine Yamal showed just how great he is for Barcelona.

title: Why Premier League giants can't afford to miss UCL riches
content: The price of failure increases as the importance of the Champions League never goes away for big clubs.

title: The pride and power of Iowa State basketball's Audi Crooks
content: Audi Crooks hears the haters. But Iowa State's star inherited resilience from her mom and joy from her dad. Her high-scoring game is the ultimate counterpoint.

title: 2026 Players Championship: Ranking the top 25 players in the field
content: We run through the top contenders among the 123-man field to win the PGA Tour's flagship event at TPC Sawgrass.

title: UFC 326 fight grades: The F in BMF stands for fail
content: The BMF title headliner between Charles Oliveira and Max Holloway earned the lowest grade at UFC 326.

title: Australian GP overreactions: Verstappen could quit F1? McLaren on the ropes?
content: After a wild, often polarising Australian Grand Prix weekend, ESPN looks at some of the sweeping generalisations being made about Formula 1 and judges whether they're overblown or not.

title: Postseason pointers: Five keys to winning in the playoffs
content: Now that the fantasy basketball playoffs have started, Eric Karabell lays out how to take home the championship.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal, Barcelona linked with out-of-contract Dortmund star
content: Arsenal and Barcelona are keen on Borussia Dortmund's Julian Brandt, while Real Madrid have again been linked with Manchester City's Rodri. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Trump Asked US Military Why They Didn't Capture Iranian Ships. Their "It's More Fun" Reply
content: Trump claimed that the US military sank 46 "top-of-the-line" Iranian naval ships over three and a half days.

title: Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: "We Are Not Done Yet In Iran," Warns Israel PM Netanyahu
content: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Iran launched new attacks Tuesday at Gulf Arab countries as it keeps up pressure on the region, while five pro-Iranian militants were killed by an airstrike in northern Iraq.

title: World's Unique Ocean Energy Plant In Lakshadweep To Power Blue Economy Push
content: Each plant produces around one lakh litres of drinking water every day, significantly improving water availability for island residents who earlier depended largely on rainfall and limited groundwater reserves.

title: Train Service Between China, North Korea Set To Resume After 6 Years
content: Passenger train service between China and North Korea is set to resume on Thursday, six years after it was suspended in 2020 due to the Covid-19 pandemic, travel operators told AFP.

title: "Terrifying Fantasy Games": Martin Wolf To NDTV On Iran War
content: "The whole thing to me now feels like fantasy games, terrifying. I hope I am wrong but I don't see how this ends because I don't see any rationality," Marti Wolf said

title: Israel Rolls Out Bomb Shelter Dating App Amid Ongoing War On Iran
content: It's the second week of the US and Israel's war on Iran, and the Jewish state has introduced a series of unconventional - many say controversial - mobile apps to help civilians adapt to life under frequent air-raid sirens.

title: Bizarre Turn In Bhopal 'Beef' Case: 3 Tests, 3 Results, No More Samples
content: Less than two months after an alleged beef transport case raised a political storm in Madhya Pradesh, the investigation has taken a bizarre turn

title: "1st Project Of Its Kind": Minister Jitendra Singh To NDTV On New Ocean-Powered Plant In Lakshadweep
content: Union Minister of State Jitendra Singh said India is building a unique ocean based facility in Lakshadweep that will generate both electricity and drinking water from the sea, a project he described as the first integrated system of its kind globally

title: Trade, Faith & Language: India-Iran Ties Run Deeper Than Diplomacy
content: From the earliest movements of wandering tribes to the rise of organised kingdoms, the lands that are today India and Iran have long moved along intertwined paths.

title: 2 Killed In Meghalaya Curfew Firing Linked To Tensions Over Garo Hills Polls
content: Two people were killed early Tuesday in Meghalaya's West Garo Hills after police opened fire while dispersing an unlawful assembly during night-curfew hours.

title: Stocks, Gold Or Debt? Where Should You Invest As Iran War Rattles Markets
content: History shows that wars and geopolitical shocks often lead to short-term volatility, but markets have generally recovered over time.

title: NDTV Exclusive: Inside India's Ocean Research Vessel Sagar Manjusha
content: NDTV spent nearly 30 hours onboard India's ocean research vessel ORV Sagar Manjusha, witnessing live scientific experiments in the Arabian Sea and getting an inside look at how researchers study the ocean floor.

title: Failed To Poison Wife Thrice, Maharashtra Man Gets Her Killed In 'Accident'
content: Officials said that Prakash had hired Mangesh Chulkar for Rs 1 lakh to get his wife killed. Chulkar then sent the arrested driver, Suryavanshi, to hit her vehicle.

title: Layer Of Dust In Delhi, Weather Office Dismisses Iran "Toxic Cloud" Rumours
content: A thick layer of dust has settled over Delhi-NCR, significantly dropping visibility and spiking pollution levels across the national capital region.

title: Why Russia's Putin May Be The Biggest Winner Of Trump's Iran War
content: For most of last year, since Donald Trump returned to the White House, Washington has sought to starve Russia's energy trade, fueling what it called Moscow's "war machine", in part by removing one of its most loyal customers -- India.

title: Cheetah Count Hits 53 After Jwala Gives Birth To 5 Cubs In Madhya Pradesh's Kuno
content: In a major boost to India's ambitious Project Cheetah, Namibian female cheetah Jwala has given birth to five healthy cubs at Kuno National Park in Madhya Pradesh's Sheopur district.

title: "Love Not A Crime": Kerala Minister Who May Lose Post Over Infidelity Row
content: Kerala transport minister KB Ganesh Kumar may have to step down weeks before the Assembly polls as the Pinarayi Vijayan-led Left Democratic Front (LDF) government tackles the challenge arising out of serious allegations by Kumar's wife

title: Trump's Sons Invest In Drone Firm Amid Escalating US-Iran War
content: Donald Trump's sons are backing a new business venture to produce autonomous drones, including defense systems, adding to conflict-of-interest questions as the US president directs military operations in Iran.

title: Iran war impact on India: LPG shortage concerns rise; which states may feel the heat?
content: West Asia tensions are disrupting commercial LPG supplies to eateries in Bengaluru, Mumbai, and Chennai. Authorities are prioritizing domestic use, impacting businesses. The government is ramping up LPG production, extending refill cycles, and forming a committee to address commercial supply requests amid import concerns.

title: Strait of Hormuz crisis: Saudi's Aramco CEO warns of 'catastrophic consequences' for oil markets
content: Saudi Aramco warns that ongoing conflict in the Strait of Hormuz could lead to catastrophic consequences for global oil markets, citing already low inventories and potential impacts on various industries. The company confirmed a small fire at its Ras Tanura Refinery following an attack, which has since been brought under control.

title: Parliament face-off: Centre, oppn clash as debate on no-confidence motion against Birla begins
content: Lok Sabha witnessed a heated debate as the opposition moved a resolution to remove Speaker Om Birla. Congress MPs questioned the authority of Jagdambika Pal, who was presiding, citing a constitutional vacuum due to the absence of a Deputy Speaker. The government defended Pal's position, leading to sharp exchanges.

title: Interfaith wedding drama in Thane: Nikah halted after girl alleges rape, conversion bid by tailor
content: A 20-year-old Bhiwandi tailor was arrested for allegedly raping a minor he befriended on social media two years ago. He reportedly attempted to force her into an inter-faith marriage upon her turning 18. Hindutva activists intervened at the planned 'nikah' on March 6, leading to the girl's rescue and the accused's booking under Pocso and IPC sections.

title: Anthropic takes US govt to court; CFO says: After President Trump’s social media posts, a major ...
content: Anthropic CEO apologized for a memo after talks with the Pentagon broke down, only to file a lawsuit against the Trump administration days later. The company seeks to overturn a national security threat designation, claiming it jeopardizes billions in revenue and irreparably harms its business and investor confidence.

title: ‘Kash aap mere paas hote’: Rinku’s emotional tribute to father after T20 WC win
content: Indian batter Rinku Singh dedicated the T20 World Cup triumph to his late father, Khanchand Singh, who passed away during the tournament.  Rinku expressed profound grief, sharing how his father's dream of seeing him as a world champion was fulfilled, but lamented his absence.  He spoke of his father's teachings on duty and the immense void left behind.

title: Is Iran war draining US weapons stockpiles? Billions spent in first 48hrs of operation
content: The US reportedly spent $5.6 billion on weaponry in the first 48 hours of operations against Iran, raising concerns about depleting advanced military supplies. US Central Command detailed over 5,000 targets struck, including naval assets and military infrastructure. President Trump issued a stern warning to Iran against disrupting oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, vowing severe retaliation.

title: Amazon sends complaint letter to FCC against Elon Musk's Starlink
content: Amazon's Project Kuiper has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's proposal for a million-satellite constellation, citing a lack of essential technical and space safety details. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, would take centuries to deploy, and could monopolize orbital resources, hindering future space endeavors.

title: BCCI announces Rs 131 crore reward for India after T20 World Cup 2026 triumph
content: Team India has been awarded a Rs 131 crore cash reward by the BCCI following their historic ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 victory. Dominating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final, India successfully defended their title, becoming the first team to win the T20 World Cup three times and solidifying their status as a premier cricketing nation.

title: Kritika Kamra and Gaurav Kapur’s wedding after-party invite details leaked
content: Actress Kritika Kamra and host Gaurav Kapur are set for an intimate Mumbai wedding on March 11-12, 2026.  They've chosen a modern, minimal celebration over a grand destination event. An after-party invitation hints at a relaxed, "unhurried" evening in South Mumbai, emphasizing authenticity for their new chapter. Read on to know more in detail.

title: CBSE issues clarification on YouTube QR code in Maths paper, here's why there are QRs on papers
content: The Central Board of Secondary Education has clarified that Class 12 Mathematics question papers remain secure despite some QR codes reportedly linking to a YouTube video. Introduced in 2019 to verify genuineness and trace leaks, the board confirmed the papers are authentic. Necessary steps are being taken to prevent future occurrences.

title: India's Title Win: Tharoor hails Samson's record T20 World Cup run; 321 runs in five innings
content: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor celebrated Sanju Samson's stellar T20 World Cup performances, revealing the cricketer called him on his birthday. Samson's remarkable comeback saw him deliver crucial match-winning innings, including a record-breaking 321 runs for India in a single edition. His consistent high scores in vital matches cemented his status as a World Cup hero.

title: Strait of Hormuz crisis could choke global oil supply within a month, warns Putin
content: President Putin warned that the US-Israeli war on Iran has triggered a global energy crisis, potentially halting oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz. He stated Russia is open to restoring energy cooperation with Europe if they signal interest in rebuilding ties.

title: Bengaluru realtor kidnapped & killed, body found dumped in Tamil Nadu; biz partner under lens
content: A realtor from Bengaluru Rural was kidnapped and murdered, his body discovered in Tamil Nadu. Assailants intercepted his car, sprayed his friend with a chemical, and abducted him. Police suspect a former business associate, Mohan Babu, driven by financial disputes and resentment, is involved in the crime.

title: Oil prices drop: IndiGo, SpiceJet shares surge as Trump signals end of Iran war near
content: The rally in crude had taken prices past the crucial $100-per-barrel level for the first time since Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022, amid fears that the Strait of Hormuz could remain shut for an extended period.

title: ‘Minute adjustments’ help Sanju Samson take giant strides at the T20 World Cup
content: India batter Sanju Samson's remarkable transformation into a steady, consistent batsman, evident in his T20 World Cup Player of the Tournament performance, stems from a period of introspection after a lean patch. His crucial half-centuries and leading run tally highlight a newfound clarity and hard work, impressing teammates and opponents alike.

title: Lavanya Tripathi files police case over defamatory Instagram posts
content: Actress Lavanya Tripathi has lodged a complaint with Hyderabad Cyber Crime Police following alleged social media harassment. A specific social handle reportedly posted defamatory content and false allegations against her and her family, causing personal distress and reputational damage. Authorities have registered a case and are investigating to identify the perpetrator.

title: Telangana Jagruthi chief K Kavitha detained during hunger strike over Velugumatla house demolitions
content: Telangana Jagruthi President Kalvakuntla Kavitha and others were detained by police on Tuesday while on a hunger strike in support of Velugumatla victims at Ambedkar Bhavan in Khammam district.

title: Karnataka: Couple ends lives after domestic dispute; toddler survives ‘murder’ bid by father
content: A young couple in Mandya allegedly died by suicide after a domestic dispute, leaving their two-year-old daughter to survive a murder attempt by her father. The incident, which occurred early Monday, saw the wife hang herself, followed by the husband's attempt to strangle their child before taking his own life. The child, thankfully, regained consciousness and is safe.

title: Team India Report Card: Perfect finish to a not-so-perfect T20 World Cup campaign
content: Defending champions India clinched their third T20 World Cup title, overcoming a challenging campaign to defeat New Zealand in the final. Despite a shaky start and testing Super 8 matches, stellar performances from Sanju Samson and Ishan Kishan, along with crucial contributions from a bowling unit led by Jasprit Bumrah, powered India to a historic victory at home.

title: No more ‘maa-behen’ gaali: Rs 500 fine in this Maharashtra village for using expletives
content: Kolgaon gram panchayat in Nashik has resolved to fine individuals Rs 500 for using abusive language involving mothers or sisters, requiring digital evidence. This initiative, proposed by a woman during International Women's Day celebrations, aims to curb casual demeaning of women's identities. The collected fines will fund village development.

title: 'Rickrolling' in board exam? CBSE Class 12 maths paper QR code 'leads' to song, sparks viral buzz
content: A QR code on the CBSE Class 12 mathematics exam paper has sparked online speculation, with students claiming it redirects to Rick Astley's "Never Gonna Give You Up" music video.  This internet prank, known as "rickrolling," has led to amusement and questions about the security of official examination documents.

title: 'Won’t stop looking': US releases video of strike on concealed Iranian missile launcher
content: US forces have released footage of a strike on a concealed Iranian missile launcher, emphasizing their commitment to dismantling such threats. This action occurs amidst an escalating conflict initiated by US-Israel strikes, which led to the death of Iran's Supreme Leader and subsequent retaliatory attacks. The war is significantly impacting global energy markets.

title: 'May or may not be a friendly takeover': Trump issues stark warning to Cuba
content: US President Donald Trump has warned Cuba of a potential "not friendly takeover" of its government, contingent on a deal with the United States. He highlighted the island's severe economic and humanitarian crisis, stating it's "running on fumes" due to dwindling resources and the loss of Venezuelan support. Discussions are reportedly underway to avert conflict

title: 'None of us could keep calm': Preity Zinta celebrates from stands as India defend T20 World Cup title - Watch
content: Bollywood stars erupted in celebration as India clinched their third ICC Men's T20 World Cup title with a dominant victory over New Zealand. Preity Zinta, present at the stadium, shared her elation, while Shah Rukh Khan and other celebrities lauded the team's commanding performance. India's historic win saw them successfully defend the T20 World Cup trophy.

title: E-7 Wedgetail: The powerful surveillance jet Australia is sending to the Gulf
content: Australia is sending a military reconnaissance aircraft and missiles to the Gulf. This move aims to protect airspace amid rising tensions. The deployment follows discussions with the UAE, which has faced aerial attacks. Australia's actions are defensive, focused on keeping Australians safe. The government is also supporting potential evacuations from the region.

title: 'Will be hit 20 times harder': Trump warns Iran against stopping flow of oil
content: President Trump issued a stern warning to Iran, vowing severe retaliation if it attempts to disrupt oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. He stated that any blockage would result in a significantly stronger US response. Amidst escalating tensions and rising oil prices, the US also announced a temporary waiver of certain oil sanctions to ease market pressure.

title: West Asia tensions disrupt commercial LPG supply in Bengaluru, Mumbai, Kolkata
content: The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas issued orders to oil refineries to increase Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) production and directed that such additional output be channelled specifically for domestic use. This decision follows recent geopolitical disruptions that created constraints on the global fuel supply chain.

title: 20-yr-old declares himself first Gen Z president of new country after discovering unclaimed land
content: A 20-year-old, Daniel Jackson, claims to have founded the Free Republic of Verdis on a disputed strip along the Danube River between Croatia and Serbia. Arguing the land is terra nullius, he built an online micronation with citizens and passports. Croatian authorities removed him after a 2023 settlement attempt, leaving him running the project from exile in the United Kingdom.

title: Crude price slides 6% after touching nearly $120 as Trump signals Iran war may end
content: Oil prices retreated Tuesday after briefly surpassing $100 a barrel, as diplomatic hopes for the Middle East conflict emerged. Despite Iran's strong warnings against regional oil exports, markets are considering US options like easing Russian sanctions and releasing strategic reserves. Analysts anticipate continued volatility, with Gulf producers also cutting output amid shipping disruptions.

title: 'Dhurandhar The Revenge' sees strong advance booking with 2.75 lakh tickets sold globally
content: The buzz around 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is palpable, with ticket pricing varying widely—starting at just Rs 59 in Chennai to a whopping Rs 2900 for luxury seating in Mumbai. With over 2.75 lakh tickets already snapped up, the film has raked in Rs 13.75 crore through advance sales, setting the stage to potentially surpass 'OG's' preview box office slam. Read on to know more in detail.

title: ‘Without money, we will die here too’: Why war hasn't stopped Indian workers heading to Middle East
content: Despite escalating tensions in West Asia, a steady stream of Indian workers are applying for visas to Gulf countries, driven by economic necessity. Many applicants acknowledge the conflict but prioritize financial stability for their families, believing the risks are manageable compared to unemployment at home.  Remittances from abroad remain a crucial lifeline for numerous Indian households.

title: 'Pani pilana, bat uthana': Siraj's viral dig on his and Kuldeep's role in World Cup win
content: Mohammed Siraj humorously described his role as a water carrier and bat holder after India's T20 World Cup 2026 victory. Despite not playing regularly, Siraj emphasized the importance of team combination over individual players, highlighting the positive environment maintained by those on the sidelines.

title: Stock market today: Nifty50 opens above 24,150; BSE Sensex up over 580 points
content: Stock market today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex opened in green on Tuesday after a major selloff on Monday amidst US-Iran war and oil price uncertainty. While Nifty50 went above 24,150, BSE Sensex was up over 580 points.

title: Dark side of internet fame: Murders, shootings and threats rock influencer world
content: Internet fame has a dark side. Popular YouTubers and influencers are facing real-world dangers. Recent incidents include violent attacks, murder, threats, and extortion. These cases show how online popularity can lead to dangerous confrontations. From highway crashes to fatal stabbings, the risks of social media stardom are becoming increasingly apparent.

title: Resolution against Lok Sabha Speaker to ‘save Constitution’, dignity of House: Gourav Gogoi
content: Initiating the debate, Gourav Gogoi claimed that the environment of Parliament has become such that the LoP is not allowed to speak in the House during the debate on the motion of thanks to the President's address

title: SC urges balance while government says IT Rules not meant to curb satire, humour or criticism
content: As Editors Guild comedian Kunal Kamra ask who decides online content is 'fake or misleading', Centre says 'when we see it, we know it is fake'

title: Restaurateurs in Hyderabad face concerns over commercial LPG supply; city is home to over 74,000 restaurants
content: Restaurant owners say they will suffer if the shortage becomes a long-term issue as they are highly dependent on LPG

title: Faunal survey in Kerala’s Vazhachal adds 26 species to checklist of wildlife division in Western Ghats
content: Findings highlight rich biodiversity of key corridor in Western Ghats. Survey was conducted by Kerala Forest dept in association with Travancore Nature History Society from February 26 to March 1

title: LPG crisis: Coimbatore hotels cut service timings, menus
content: The Sree Annapoorna Sree Gowrishankar Group put out a notice on Monday night informing customers that it will limit its menu to essential items, and the availability of some items will be restricted to specific hours of the day

title: Only tea and coffee at restaurants in Bengaluru due to shortage of gas cylinders
content: The Bengaluru Hotels Association, on March 9, expressed that the hotels in the capital may have to shut down if regular supply of commercial gas cylinders is not resumed

title: Assam elections: Three MLAs among nine candidates announced in first AIUDF list
content: Among the nine candidates named are a former Congress legislator and a minority students’ body president who was in Congress for three days

title: Karur stampede: Former T.N. Minister Senthilbalaji to appear before CBI on March 17
content: Mr. Senthilbalaji was reportedly summoned by the CBI for questioning on March 9, but the notice had not been received by anyone at his office or residence.

title: Kerala HC dismisses pleas challenging govt sending bulk messages on ‘achievements’ to employees, others
content: Petitioners had alleged that sending of unsolicited, bulk messages was unauthorised use of personal data of government employees, judges and beneficiaries of government schemes by Chief Minister’s Office ahead of Assembly elections

title: LPG shortage looms large, but Hyderabad haleem to stay on menu
content: The dish is cooked in wood-fired ovens known as ‘bhatti’. Restaurateurs say regular food served to the personnel working in the restaurant industry is likely to be affected.

title: CBSE Class 12 Math paper QR code sends users to ‘rickroll’ prank video
content: Rickrolling is an internet prank in which users scan a seemingly legitimate code that instead directs them to the music video for Rick Astley’s 1987 hit, ‘Never Gonna Give You Up’

title: IDFC First Bank paid ₹645 crore towards Chandigarh fraud claims
content: The Bank said that it has completed reconciliation of all relevant accounts and did not notice any further discrepancies.

title: ‘The trophy belongs to 1.4 billion’: Kirti Azad slams Surya Kumar Yadav, Jay Shah for temple visit
content: Criticising Surya Kumar Yadav and Jay Shah’s temple visit in Ahmedabad with the trophy, the former cricketer said, “Siraj never paraded it at a Mosque. Sanju never took it to a Church.”

title: Over 5,000 litres of adulterated cooking oil seized in Gachibowli; expired wheat flour repackaged for sale
content: The accused allegedly collected expired cooking oil and mixed it with soybean oil, as per preliminary investigation

title: ‘Spineless, gutless’: Arundhati Roy slams Indian Government for not condemning U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran
content: What does it mean for our Prime Minister to have traveled to Israel and embraced Benyamin Netanyahu just days before he attacked Iran, for our government to sign a groveling trade deal with the U.S. that sells our farmers and textile industry down the river, for us to now be given ‘permission’ to buy oil from Russia, she asked

title: Curfew clamped, mobile internet services suspended in Meghalaya's West Garo Hills following violence
content: The curfew order prohibits the movement of any person outside their residence within the limits of the West Garo Hills district during the curfew period

title: KSRTC launches double-decker bus for Kozhikode city tour
content: While ceremonial launch has been completed, commencement of regular services faces some challenges from low-hanging shade trees along the routes

title: Search operation launched after suspected Pakistani drone activity in Jammu & Kashmir's Samba
content: The officials said a joint search operation by the Army, police and Border Security Force is under way in the area where reports of drone sightings were received

title: Congress follows democracy; BJP functions as a dictatorship, says former MP V.S. Ugrappa
content: Senior Congress leader and former MP V.S. Ugrappa claimed that decisions in the BJP were taken either by Prime Minister Narendra Modi or by leaders of the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS)

title: SC directs Centre to frame no-fault compensation policy for serious adverse events post COVID-19 vaccination
content: The judgment by a Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta was based on a petition seeking compensation for ‘After Effects From Immunisation’ (AEFI) deaths allegedly caused by COVID-19 vaccination

title: Kavitha, Visharadan Maharaj on hunger strike shifted to Hyderabad
content: The two leaders launched the strike demanding justice to the displaced poor families of Vinoba Navodaya Colony, Velugumatla

title: CEC to review Bengal poll preparedness, hold press conference on March 10
content: CEC Gyanesh Kumar faces ‘go back’ slogans, shown black flags outside Dakshineswar temple and Kalighat Temple

title: Kerala Minister K.B. Ganesh Kumar’s wife says she won’t pursue complaint after his apology
content: Bindu Menon had levelled allegations of infidelity against Ganesh Kumar after he denied rumours circulating on social media regarding the matter

title: NCERT issues 'unconditional, unqualified apology' over textbook with reference to 'corruption' in judiciary
content: "The Director and Members of NCERT hereby tender an unconditional and unqualified apology for the said Chapter IV. The entire book has been withdrawn and is not available," NCERT said in a statement

title: Oil Ministry sets up panel as commercial LPG shortage hits hospitality sector
content: Industry sources say the disruption has already begun affecting operations in Mumbai and Bengaluru, as hotels and restaurants struggle to secure cooking gas

title: Four astronomy facilities announced in Union Budget to cost ₹3,500 crore, to be completed over a period of three to 13 years
content: IIA Director Professor Annapurni Subramaniam informed that the projects will be completed over a period of three to 13 years

title: With discharge in excise case, Kejriwal is back to win lost turf and hearts
content: Not only does the court order put AAP in a good light, but it also paints the Bharatiya Janata Party in a bad light, party leaders say

title: Gulbarga University alumni highlight climate change impact on women
content: K. S. Aishwarya, lecturer in zoology, noted that gender inequality persists globally, with women owning far less wealth than men and remaining disproportionately represented among the poor

title: Parliament Budget session LIVE: Gaurav Gogoi says Opposition, especially LoP Rahul Gandhi, being disallowed to speak in Lok Sabha
content: Congress MP Mohammed Jawed moves resolution to remove Speaker, House agrees on a 10-hour debate over the resolution; in the Rajya Sabha, Leader of Opposition Mallikarjun Kharge spoke on the Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls in many States and called the process "fraud"

title: Chhattisgarh: Congress grills BJP on opium cultivation issue
content: The Opposition MLAs caused a ruckus in the House alleging that the BJP leader Vinayak Tamrakar was involved in the farming in Durg district and claimed that he enjoyed protection from the ruling party

title: Tea workers’ wage hike notified in poll-bound Assam
content: The interim increase of ₹30 per day follows the distribution of land ownership deeds to tea garden workers through the amended Assam Fixation of Ceiling on Land Holding Act

title: Haryana CM accuses AAP government in Punjab of indulging in ‘election-time freebie politics’
content: Responding to the Punjab government’s budget announcement of providing ₹1,500 to women from the SC category and ₹1,000 to other women, Haryana CM said the AAP government is making these announcements with the upcoming Assembly elections in mind.

title: M.P. High Court cancels Congress MLA’s win for hiding criminal cases, declares former BJP Minister elected
content: A Single Bench of Justice Gurpal Singh Ahluwalia in Gwalior gave the verdict in an Election Petition filed by Mr. Rawat and said that Congress MLA Mukesh Malhotra has “deliberately and knowingly suppressed material information regarding framing of charges in two pending criminal cases and misled the electorate”.

title: How fast‑tracking the Women’s Reservation Bill could reshape the 2027 electoral map
content: The timing of these “feelers” is significant. In 2027, seven States go to polls, four of which are ruled by the BJP

title: Supreme Court approves Centre's proposal extending term of tribunal members
content: Everybody who was appointed under the Tribunal Reforms Act of 2021 will continue. By next September, either this Budget session or the Monsoon session, a new law is likely to be enacted, says Attorney General R Venkataramani adding that about 21 members are due to retire in the meantime.

title: CJI calls on High Court collegiums to consider female lawyers of Supreme Court for judgeship
content: The CJI requested the High Court collegiums to widen the zone of their consideration and include women advocates from their states who are practising in the Supreme Court for elevation.

title: HALEU-Thorium fuel unsuitable for Indian nuclear reactors: study
content: The proponents of ANEEL, a new type of nuclear fuel, have suggested it can be dropped into existing reactors, including PHWRs, allowing them to use thorium today

title: The quiet demographic revolution unfolding in India
content: India, long viewed as the archetype of a ‘high-fertility developing country’, has quietly become a relatively low-fertility society

title: Khamenei killing: Mehbooba Mufti, NC MPs from J&K visit Iran Embassy in Delhi to express condolences
content: “We pray that Iran emerges as victorious in its fight against evil, as it stands alone. It seems all those whose names surfaced in the Epstein files are standing with Israel,” the PDP chief said

title: PM must take responsibility for foreign policy failure and resign: J&K Congress chief
content: Congress workers held street protests in parts of J&K against the proposed India-U.S. trade deal and alleged it was bound to “affect local economic interests”; several leaders detained

title: West Bengal SIR test: reading the Supreme Court’s order
content: Why did the Supreme Court order the deployment of judicial officers to decide electoral roll disputes in West Bengal? What triggered the debate of whether the Election Commission should be equipped with permanent staff? With 60 lakh cases pending adjudication, what does publication of final rolls mean?

title: T.N. forest department plants 20,000 mangrove seedlings along Buckingham canal
content: The mangrove restoration is part of a phased programme to establish a green belt of mangrove species in the district

title: Metro Rail seeks CCRS approval to relax curbs on Poonamallee-Vadapalani stretch
content: A CMRL official says the frequency between Poonamallee and Porur can be brought down from 15 minutes to 10 minutes if the Chief Commissioner of Railway Safety approves the request; CMRL has also requested for operation of trains at a speed of 40 kmph between Porur and Vadapalani

title: Commercial LPG cylinders remain unfilled at Chennai bottling plants of oil marketing companies
content: Distributors of Indian Oil, Bharat Petroleum, and Hindustan Petroleum confirm that bottling of commercial cylinders had been stopped at the plants. Hotels, restaurants, small eateries, and tea stalls take the hit and initiate stringency measures

title: Rajasthan Assembly passes Bill to scrap two-child norm for panchayat elections
content: The Rajasthan Panchayati Raj (Amendment) Bill, 2026, was passed in the House after an acrimonious debate, in which the Opposition Congress MLAs questioned the need for reversing the decision taken three decades ago

title: Former AGP leader Jayanta Khaund joins Congress
content: Welcoming him into the party, Gaurav Gogoi said the induction of a grassroots leader like Jayanta Khaund reflected growing discontent in Assam against the leadership of Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma

title: Prime Minister to launch projects worth ₹10,800 crore at Kochi event
content: Modi to lay foundation stone for a polypropylene unit at Kochi Refinery; He will  also inaugurate 23 rural roads constructed under Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana in the State

title: Sharad Pawar, Ramdas Athawale among 26 elected unopposed to Rajya Sabha
content: In Telangana, Congress candidates Abhishek Singhvi and Vem Narender Reddy were elected unopposed. In Tamil Nadu, all six candidates were elected unopposed

title: Call for deferring SA-2 exam in view of Ugadi, Id holidays
content: Parents and teachers have urged the DSEL to postpone the exam which is now scheduled to be held from March 20

title: PM Modi speaks to Nepal leaders Rabi Lamichhane, Balendra Shah
content: The PM congratulated the Rastriya Swatantra Party leaders on their election victory and conveyed India's commitment to work with them for mutual prosperity, progress and well-being of the two countries

title: Tamil Nadu can never be painted in saffron, says CM Stalin
content: The BJP will never be able to rule the State even if it comes  wearing the mask of the AIADMK, the DMK president says at the 12th State conference of the party at Siruganur on the outskirts of Tiruchi

title: Madras HC directs GRH Dean to complete post-mortem in alleged ‘custodial’ death of youth in Sivaganga
content: During the course of the hearing, Additional Advocate General M. Ajmal Khan submitted that there was no custodial torture as alleged and that the youth was never taken to the Manamadurai police station

title: Farmers urged to prepare for potential El Nino impact
content: El Nino, occurring once every two to seven years, may influence monsoon rainfall and the agricultural sector in the country

title: JPC on higher education Bill to interact with UGC, AICTE, NCTE officials this week
content: The Viksit Bharat Shiksha Adhishthan Bill was introduced to ‘overhaul the regulatory framework’ of higher education in India by replacing the UGC, AICTE, and NCTE with a single regulatory body

title: Mobilisation for a column on denotified tribes in Census forms picks up pace
content: Associations of denotified, nomadic, and semi-nomadic tribes in north India form a central action committee; community leaders demand meeting with Census officers

title: KSHEC hosts lecture on Cuba’s experience in science, innovation and international cooperation
content: Cuban diplomat reflects on the ties between Cuba and Kerala, emphasises the scope for deeper collaboration. He pushes for partnerships between universities and research institutions in Kerala and Cuba

title: If BNS distinguishes between throwing and administering acid, RPwD Act must too: Supreme Court
content: Chief Justice Kant said statutory provisions should be able to cover not only acts committed, but also be able to foresee offences which in all probability may occur in the future

title: Law and order lapses during Bengal polls will not be tolerated: CEC
content: Whenever we spoke about SIR, they said the matter is in the Supreme Court. If that is the case, why did they call a meeting?, Bengal Minister Chandrima Bhattacharya said

title: Mamata accuses CEC of threatening West Bengal officials during meeting
content: Trinamool Congress chairperson says to ensure free and fair elections, BJP must allow those on adjudication list to vote

title: West Asia dominates Lok Sabha; resolution on Speaker’s removal not taken up
content: Government unlikely to agree to discuss West Asia crisis after External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar made a suo motu statement on the issue in both Houses of Parliament

title: Women will be provided stalls on edge of restored lakes, promises CM Revanth Reddy
content: Revanth Reddy assured people living on the fringes of tanks and canals that the government would work to rehabilitate affected families

title: Manipur BJP unit protests against Central and State BJP for inaction in MLA’s death
content: ‘Despite the death of a sitting MLA belonging to the ruling party, there has been no visible accountability for those responsible for the assault,’ the Thanlon unit of the BJP says in a statement

title: Soldier goes missing during river crossing drill in Jammu
content: The Army said extensive search operations were underway with all available resources of the Indian Army and civil agencies being employed to locate the soldier

title: Government sends feelers to Opposition on women’s quota law implementation
content: The government is looking into bringing an amendment to the 106th Constitutional Amendment Act to remove the requirement of delimitation for reserving seats for women in Lok Sabha and State Assemblies

title: Professors promoted as Principals in government arts and science colleges
content: The appointments are based on directions issued by the Kerala Administrative Tribunal (KAT) in connection with disputes over Principal appointments in government colleges

title: Hotels may shut if LPG supply not resumed: Bengaluru Hotels Association
content: Meanwhile, State CM Siddaramaiah criticised the Centre over the recent increase in LPG cylinder prices, saying the hike was not justified

title: Police must upgrade themselves to tackle cybercrime, drug menace: CM Revanth Reddy
content: Referring to the increasing instances of cybercrime, CM Revanth Reddy said the police department should upgrade technology and recruit technical experts to handle complex cases

title: As summer sets in, residents raise concern over water shortage in Kochi
content: The situation is expected to worsen as temperatures continue to rise, raising concerns among residents about the availability of adequate drinking water in the coming weeks

title: Is the Super Bowl MVP an RB1 in Fantasy? Kenneth Walker III moves to Kansas City
content: the Kansas City Chiefs plan to sign super bowl LX MVP Kenneth Walker III during free agency . he is coming off the second 1,000-yard rushing season of his four-year career . the Chiefs have long been viewed as a top-10 fantasy option at the position .

title: Dolphins signing Malik Willis to replace Tua Tagovailoa: Answering 6 key questions
content: the Miami Dolphins agree to a three-year, $67.5 million deal with quarterback malik Willis . the deal presumably makes him the team's starting quarterback for at least the 2026 season . first-year general manager Jon-Eric Sullivan played coy with his interest in him at the NFL combine .

title: Panthers land Phillips on 4-year deal, sources say
content: former Dolphins linebacker jaelan Phillips agrees to a four-year, $120 million deal with the Carolina Panthers . the deal includes $80 million in guarantees, according to ESPN NFL Insider Adam Schefter . Phillips called landing in Philadelphia "literally the greatest thing that has happened to me"

title: 'Like they robbed a bank in broad daylight': CFB's unique tampering etiquette
content: coach Dabo Swinney calls out Ole Miss for "blatant" tampering . he says school tried to lure a Clemson player into the transfer portal . coach says he bailed for more money at Ole miss .

title: What does White House fight card say about the state of the UFC?
content: a six-fight slate for Freedom Fights 250 is set for June 14 in washington, d.c., on the white house South Lawn . defending champion Ilia Topuria and interim champion Justin Gaethje will meet for the right to be called "undisputed"

title: Why did the Chiefs sign Kenneth Walker III, and what's next for Kansas City?
content: the Seahawks went 6-11 in 2025, their worst record since 2012 . he has split carries in the league, landing between 153 and 221 . his contract is set to become one of the largest deals for a running back in league history .
